ref: The seeds that fell along the road are the people who hear the message. But Satan soon comes and snatches it away from them.
text: Be komɛ ɔ, munyu ɔ ya nɔɔ blɔ tue. Ni nɛ ɔmɛ nuɔ, se amlɔ nɔuu nɛ a nu ɔ, Satan baa ba saa munyu nɛ a du ngɛ a mi ɔ.
translated: He said, "My friend, you are the one who will bring us trouble. If you don't listen to us, Satan will come and take you away."

ref: When the king went in to meet the guests, he found that one of them wasn't wearing the right kind of clothes for the wedding.
text: “Se benɛ matsɛ ɔ ba ni ɔmɛ a hyɛmi ɔ, e ba na nɔ ko ngɛ lejɛ ɔ nɛ wui yo kpeemi tade;
translated: If a person does something bad and he is caught, he will be punished according to the law.

ref: They love the best seats at banquets and the front seats in the synagogues.
text: nɛ a suɔ okplɔɔ yi himi ngɛ niyeni si, kɛ nikɔtɔmahi a sihi hehi ngɛ kpe he ɔmɛ,
translated: He went to the farm yesterday and saw a big snake, so he ran home quickly.

ref: The girl left and asked her mother, “What do you think I should ask for?” Her mother answered, “The head of John the Baptist!”
text: Lɔ ɔ he ɔ jokuɛ yo ɔ je kpo nɛ e ya bi e nyɛ ke: “Mɛni ma bi?” Nɛ e ke: “Yohane Baptisilɔ ɔ yi.”
translated: He asked him, "Who are you?" And he said, "I am John the Baptist."

ref: So they sealed it tight and placed soldiers there to guard it.
text: Kɛkɛ nɛ a pue nɔ kɛ ho, nɛ a ya sɔu yɔkɔ ɔ nya, nɛ a ha aslaafo ɔmɛ bu he.
translated: The child is playing in the house, and he is happy, and he is playing with his toys.

ref: When Herod found out that the wise men from the east had tricked him, he was very angry. He gave orders for his men to kill all the boys who lived in or near Bethlehem and were two years old and younger. This was based on what he had learned from the wise men.
text: Jeha nɛ ɔ benɛ Herode na kaa ni leli ɔmɛ sisi lɛ ɔ, e muklii mi fu wawɛɛ, nɛ e tsɔ a ya gbe jokuɛ nyumuwi tsuo nɛ ngɛ Betlehem kɛ lejɛ ɔ ni ɔmɛ a mi tsuo, ninɛmɛ nɛ ye jeha enyɔ kɛ ninɛmɛ nɛ yi ja ngɛ be nɛ e bi ni leli ɔmɛ fitsofitso ɔ nya.
translated: When Herod heard this, he was troubled, and all Jerusalem with him. And assembling all the chief priests and scribes of the people, he inquired of them where the Christ was to be born. They told him, “In Bethlehem of Judea, for so it is written by the prophet.”

ref: But I tell you that Solomon with all his wealth wasn't as well clothed as one of them.
text: Se i ngɛ nyɛ dee ke: Salmo kɛ e nyami ɔ tsuo tete mia we kaa enɛ ɔmɛ a kpɛti kake.
translated: He said that it is good: The Psalm says that he will always be with us.

ref: But Jesus replied: You want a sign because you are evil and won't believe! But the only sign you will get is the sign of the prophet Jonah.
text: Se Yesu he nɔ nɛ e de mɛ ke: “Yi nɔ bi yayahi kɛ gba puɛli ngɛ okadi hlae; se a be mɛ okadi ko hae, kaa ja gbalɔ Yona okadi ɔ.
translated: Jesus said to them, “This is the work of God, that you believe in him whom he has sent.”

ref: You may be sure a servant who is always faithful will be put in charge of everything the master owns.
text: Niinɛ, i ngɛ nyɛ dee ke, e maa ngɔ lɛ ngɔ to e nihi tsuo kulaa nya.
translated: Yes, I am not well, I am feeling pain in my stomach.

ref: At noon the sky turned dark and stayed that way until three o'clock.
text: Se kɛ je piani ngmlɛ nyɔngma kɛ enyɔ kɛ ya su ngmlɛ etɛ ɔ, diblii wo ngɛ zugba a tsuo nɔ.
translated: If you plan to go and do something bad, and you think you can hide it, you are deceiving yourself.

ref: The angel looked as bright as lightning, and his clothes were white as snow.
text: Nɛ e hɛ mi kpɛ kaa slaba la, nɛ e tade ɔ hu hiɛ futafuta kaa snoo.
translated: He went to the farm yesterday, and he saw a lot of animals there.

ref: Jesus asked, “Who is my mother and who are my brothers?”
text: Yesu he nɔ nɛ e de mɛ ke: “Mɛnɔ ji ye nyɛ, nɛ mɛnɔmɛ ji ye nyɛmimɛ ɔmɛ?”
translated: Jesus said to him, “Why do you call me good? No one is good except God alone.”

ref: Why worry about clothes? Look how the wild flowers grow. They don't work hard to make their clothes.
text: “Nɛ mɛ he je nɛ nyɛ peɔ yeyeeye ngɛ tade he? Nyɛ susu nga nɔ mɔmɔ ɔmɛ a he, bɔ nɛ a puɛɛ ɔ: atsu we ni, jeha nɔ hu a tsɛ̃ we kpa.
translated: Why are you asking me this question? Don't you know that I am a child? If you want to know, ask my mother. She will tell you everything.

ref: Jesus called his disciples together and told them, “I feel sorry for these people. They have been with me for three days, and they don't have anything to eat. I don't want to send them away hungry. They might faint on their way home.”
text: Yesu tsɛ e kaseli ɔmɛ kɛ ba nɛ e ke: “Ye muklii mi ngɛ mi sae ngɛ asafo ɔmɛ a he, kaa mwɔnɛ ji ligbi etɛ nɛ a kɛ mi hi si, nɛ a be nɔ́ ko nɛ a maa ye; nɛ i sume kaa ma wo mɛ blɔ kɛ hwɔ nɛ eko ɔ klibi ya po mɛ ngɛ blɔ ɔ nɔ.”
translated: Jesus said to them, “Truly I say to you, unless you turn and become like children, you will not enter the kingdom of heaven. Whoever humbles himself like this child is the greatest in the kingdom of heaven. And whoever welcomes one such child in my name welcomes me.”

ref: Suddenly a man with leprosy came and knelt in front of Jesus. He said, “Lord, you have the power to make me well, if only you wanted to.”
text: Nɛ oʼɛ, tsitsɛ ko ba kpla si ngɛ e hɛ mi nɛ e ke: “Nyɔmtsɛ, ke o suɔ ɔ, o ma nyɛ ma ha ye he nɛ tsɔ!”
translated: My friend, listen carefully to what I am going to tell you: "Woman, you are beautiful, you are the one I want to marry!"

ref: If one of my followers sins against you, go and point out what was wrong. But do it in private, just between the two of you. If that person listens, you have won back a follower.
text: “Ke o nyɛmi ko tɔ o nɔ ɔ, yaa nɛ o ya tsɔɔ lɛ e tɔmi ɔ, o kɛ lɛ ni enyɔ kɛkɛ. Ke e bu mo tue ɔ, nyɛmi pee nyɛmi.
translated: He said that he will go and see her, but she said that she will not go. He said that if she does not go, he will not go either.

ref: Isn't he the son of the carpenter? Isn't Mary his mother, and aren't James, Joseph, Simon, and Judas his brothers?
text: Anɛ pi kapitɛ ɔ bi ɔji nɛ ɔ? Anɛ pi e nyɛ nɛ a tsɛɛ Maria a, kɛ e nyɛmimɛ nyumuhi Yakobo kɛ Yose kɛ Simon kɛ Yuda a?
translated: Where is the captain? Is it not the one who is called Maria, and whose brothers are Jacob, Joseph, Simon, and Judah?

ref: And don't carry a traveling bag or an extra shirt or sandals or a walking stick. Workers deserve their food.
text: jeha nɛ ɔ hu, nyɛ ko hɛɛ blɔ hiami kotoku loo hiɔwe tade enyɔ, loo tokotahi; loo dɛma tso tete, pse ni tsulɔ ɔ e ngma sa lɛ.
translated: The one who is wise, he knows that the world is full of deceit, and he walks carefully, he does not rush; he observes things from afar, and he understands what is good and what is bad.

ref: Jesus looked up toward heaven, and with a groan he said, “Effatha!” which means “Open up!”
text: Nɛ e hyɛ hiɔwe, nɛ e ye kɔmɔ ngɛ e mumi mi, nɛ e de amuɛti tuekpokulɔ ɔ ke: “Hefata!” e sisi ji: “Bli!”
translated: When he was going, he said to them, "Go into the world and preach the gospel to all creation. He said to them, "Go!"

ref: Jesus told the man to stand up where everyone could see him.
text: Yesu de nɔ nɛ nine gbo ɔ ke: “Tee si nɛ o ba da kpɛti!”
translated: Jesus said to him, “Today salvation has come to this house!”
